title: UAE Eid Al Fitr 2026: Top brands offering up to 90% discounts - Here's how to grab the best deals before it ends
summary_full: Eid Al Fitr 2026 in the UAE transforms into a grand shopping and lifestyle festival. Expect massive discounts up to 90% across malls, fashion, and electronics. Enjoy free parking and entry to attractions like Dubai Miracle Garden. Restaurants offer special festive menus, making it a peak saving season for all.
